_comment: Mutation-testing gate for the money-critical commerce paths (R2-15 A+). Scoped to the fee/escrow/payment functions so the score measures the strength of the money tests, not thinly-covered CRUD. Run: npm run test:mutation. Currently ~99%. break=92 keeps refactor headroom while enforcing the high-signal floor; the ~3 residual survivors are fail()/label copy strings and one equivalent initializer (let onboarded=false, always overwritten) — deliberately not chased (would need brittle copy assertions or disable-comments).
